description_long: This is a modern, mid-century inspired wooden shelving unit with a rich, dark brown wood grain finish. The structure features a unique stepped design, with a taller open cubby on one side and a longer, lower shelf extending horizontally. Below the main shelf, there are three evenly spaced open cubbies, providing ample storage or display space. The unit stands on four angled, tapered legs, giving it a light and elevated appearance. All surfaces are flat and smooth, with no visible doors, handles, or glass panels. The open design makes it suitable for displaying books, decor, or storing everyday items in urban environments such as lobbies, offices, or residential entryways.
description: A dark wood, mid-century style open shelving unit with a stepped design and three lower cubbies, standing on four angled legs. Its smooth, open surfaces are ideal for display or storage.
description_view_0: The shelving unit is seen from above, highlighting the stepped design and the open cubbies below the main shelf.
description_view_1: The side view shows the depth of the unit and the solid wood grain pattern on the side panel.
description_view_2: This top-down view from the opposite side emphasizes the symmetry of the three lower cubbies and the elevated cubby on the right.
description_view_3: The other side view displays the solid wood grain panel and the unit's overall rectangular profile.
